# Nomad Riverside Stay Terelj

> Authentic Mongolian ger camp located by the Tuul River inside Gorkhi-Terelj National Park, Mongolia. A small private retreat with 3 traditional gers and 2 camping tents — about 70 km / 1.5 hours from Ulaanbaatar. Operated by a local family.

## Quick Facts

- **Location**: Tuul Riverside, Gorkhi-Terelj National Park, Töv Province, Mongolia
- **Distance from Ulaanbaatar**: ~70 km (1.5–2 hours by car)
- **Coordinates**: 47.97°N, 107.46°E
- **Capacity**: 3 traditional gers + 2 camping tents (up to ~14 guests total)
- **Operating season**: Best May to early October (summer/autumn)
- **Languages**: Mongolian, English
- **Contact**: info@tereljnomadstays.com, +976 8884 9073 (WhatsApp)
- **Website**: https://tereljnomadstays.com
- **Instagram**: @nomad_terelj
- **Airbnb**: Listed as "Nomad Riverside Stay Terelj"

## Accommodation

- **Traditional Mongolian Ger** — $90 per night, up to 4 people. Comfortable beds, bedding, warm insulated felt walls, authentic Mongolian experience. Best for comfort, families, colder nights.
- **Camping Tent** — $50 per night, up to 4 people. Simple 2-room tent with basic camping setup. Best for budget travelers, nature lovers, adventure seekers. Weather-dependent.

## Tours (with private driver)

- **Terelj National Park Tour** — $100 total for 2–4 people. Includes private car + driver, Turtle Rock (Melkhii Khad), and Aryabal Meditation Temple.
- **Chinggis Khan Statue Tour** — $30 per person (entry ticket not included). Visit the world's largest equestrian statue (40 m tall) about 1 hour from camp.

## Activities

- **Horse Riding** — $20–25 per hour per person. The classic Mongolian experience.
- **Camel Riding** — $20 per hour per person.
- **Khorkhog (Mongolian BBQ)** — $30 per person, minimum 2 people. Traditional dish cooked inside a sealed container with hot river stones.
- **Bonfire & Stargazing** — $15 per person. Includes bonfire, tea or hot milk, marshmallow roasting under one of the darkest skies in Asia.

## Packages (better value)

- **Terelj Experience Package** — $130–160 per person. Includes ger stay + Terelj park tour + horse riding.
- **Evening Experience Package** — $45 per person. Includes khorkhog + bonfire + stargazing + tea/hot milk + marshmallows.

## Nearby Attractions (within 2 hours)

- **Turtle Rock (Melkhii Khad)** — Iconic 24 m granite formation shaped like a turtle. ~15 min from camp.
- **Aryabal Meditation Temple** — Buddhist temple on a hillside reached by a 108-step path. ~30 min from camp.
- **Chinggis Khan Equestrian Statue** — World's largest equestrian statue (40 m). ~1 hour drive.
- **Gorkhi-Terelj National Park** — Hiking, alpine meadows, dramatic rock formations, Tuul River.
- **Ulaanbaatar** — Capital city, Gandan Monastery, Sukhbaatar Square, National Museum. ~1.5 hours away.
- **Khustai National Park** — Home to wild Przewalski's horses (takhi). ~3 hours from Terelj (separate day trip from UB).

## Why Choose Us

- Genuine riverside location on the Tuul River (not a roadside camp).
- Small and private: only 5 accommodation units, never crowded.
- Family-run: authentic Mongolian hospitality and personal attention.
- Inside the protected national park — pristine nature and dark skies.
- Honest pricing with no hidden fees.

## Best Time to Visit

- **May–June**: Wildflowers, green steppe, mild weather (10–22°C).
- **July–August**: Peak summer, warmest, best for camping (15–28°C).
- **September**: Autumn colors, fewer tourists, crisp air (5–18°C).
- **October–April**: Off-season; very cold, camp typically closed.

## How to Get Here

From Ulaanbaatar (UB):
1. Private car/taxi: 1.5–2 hours, ~70 km on paved road, ask for "Nomad Riverside Stay Terelj" or use coordinates 47.97, 107.46.
2. We can arrange airport pickup or transfer from UB on request — please contact in advance.

## Booking & Notes

- Advance booking strongly recommended, especially July–August.
- Prices may vary slightly based on group size and season.
- Custom multi-day itineraries can be arranged.
- WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us: +976 8884 9073.
- Email: info@tereljnomadstays.com
